scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w monolith" "npm run dev -w gateway" "npm run dev -w realtime"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w monolith && npm run build -w gateway && npm run build -w realtime
scripts.test: npm run test -w monolith && npm run test -w gateway
scripts.clean: rm -rf shared/dist gateway/dist monolith/dist realtime/dist node_modules
